description: The ConeGizmo component is auto generated for interaction with a ConeMesh or ConeCollider via a Dev Tool.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to translate and edit.
fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to automatically position this at the target slot.
fields._interactingComponent: the component This is interacting with.
fields._material: The material being used for the visual.
fields._toolPoint: The point that follows the interacting tool's tip.
fields._activePoint: The point that follows the gizmo visual.
fields._lineRoot: the root of the line visual from the gizmo to the interacting tool's tip.
fields._lineSegment: The segment mesh being used for the line visual.
fields._snapHighlight: the root of the snap highlight for snapping.
fields.TargetAngle: The field being edited for the angle of the cone.
fields.TargetRadius: The field being edited for the radius of the cone base.
fields.TargetHeight: The field being edited for the height of the cone.
fields.TargetDirection: The field being edited for the cone direction.
fields.TargetRotation: The field being edited for the cone rotation.
fields.FixedAngle: The angle that the cone should be at (shape).
fields.FixedHeight: The height that the cone mesh should be.
fields.FixedDirection: The direction the cone should be facing.
fields.LineThickness: The thickness of the lines of the visual.
fields.MinHeight: The minimum height the cone can be set to.
fields.MaxHeight: The maximum height the cone can be set to.
fields.MinAngle: The minimum tip angle the cone can be set to (shape).
fields.MaxAngle: The maximum tip angle the cone can be set to (shape).
fields._visualRoot: The root slot of the visual for this gizmo.
fields._visualRot: The rotation field of the ``_visualRoot`` slot.
fields._handles: A list of Handle objects this cone gizmo has.
fields._heightMesh: The mesh being used to signal the height of the cone.
fields._coneLineMesh: The line segment based mesh that shows the cone itself.
